i(n>>>8==0),n},e.prototype.finderPenaltyCountPatterns=function(t){var e=t[1];i(e<=3*this.size);var t&&(this.finderPenaltyAddHistory(e,n),e=0),e+=this.size,this.finderPenaltyAddHistory(e,n),this.finderPenaltyCountP
